modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Email account created with incorrect capitalization of first name.

full_description_text:  
So, I just noticed that my USD email has the i in my first name capitalized, but it should be lowercase. It's kinda annoying because it doesn't match how I usually write it. Can you help fix this? Thanks!
short_description: Email account created with incorrect capitalization of first name.
